DriverID_Note: AI driver ID from the telemetry spec's Driver ID appendix (2026 Season Pack PDF, p.26). Omit and use CustomDriverLastName instead if the driver isn't listed there.
CustomDriverLastName_Note: Overrides the DriverID name lookup when set. Use for drivers not in the DriverID table (e.g. reserve/rookie call-ups).
TeamID_Note: Team ID from DefaultTeams.json (use this season's ID block, e.g. the '26 entries).
CustomTeamLogo_Note: Overrides the TeamID logo lookup when set. Filename only, resolved against /images/team-logos/.
Points_Note: Mandatory. A row only renders if this is set (0 counts as set) — omit entirely to keep a row inactive/staged.
Other_Notes: This is the template entry — copy it for new rows and delete the _Note fields. Position on screen is this entry's position in the array (top to bottom), not the Points value — sort the array yourself, highest points first.
